title: Reimagining Power Project
excerpt: Exploring how web3 can redistribute power in philanthropy and social impact — with case studies from All In For Sport, Equality Fund, and the Institute for Community Sustainability.
content: The Reimagining Power Project (RPP) is SuperBenefit's flagship initiative, investigating how decentralized technologies can shift power dynamics in traditional social impact sectors.

title: All In For Sport
excerpt: Applying the Reimagining Power framework to sport organizations — building decentralized governance models for equitable, community-driven sport funding.
content: All In For Sport (AIFS) applies the RPP framework to sport organizations, exploring how web3 tools can enable more equitable and transparent funding mechanisms.

title: DAO Primitives Framework
excerpt: A conceptual framework for designing purpose-aligned networks of autonomous teams — covering group phase, scale, and state.
content: The DAO Primitives Framework provides modular building blocks for designing decentralized organizations, helping teams choose the right coordination patterns for their context.
